name: roBrowserLegacy RemoteClient-JS Authorized Reference Pack
title: roBrowserLegacy RemoteClient-JS Authorized Reference Pack
description: Curated architecture notes for roBrowserLegacy RemoteClient-JS as an authorized asset-serving reference.
changelog: 2026-05-23: Added authorized remote client architecture reference entries.
trustPolicy: Authorized code reference is contextual for GRF asset delivery and proxy architecture. Local project data still has priority.
conflictPolicy: Use these entries as read-only architecture hints only. They never block alone.

entries.title: RemoteClient-JS unified mode
entries.summary: RemoteClient-JS documents a unified Node.js mode that serves assets, static files, and WebSocket proxy traffic from one process.
entries.details: The README describes Unified Server Mode replacing separate asset-server, static-server, and standalone WebSocket proxy processes. This is useful for future adapter and deployment planning around browser play, GRF asset serving, and rAthena proxy flows.
entries.appliesTo: browser asset and network delivery architecture
warnings: Authorized reference only. Preserve provenance and any declared notice context for future adaptations.

entries.title: RemoteClient-JS GRF pipeline
entries.summary: RemoteClient-JS documents DATA.INI loading, GRF indexing, LRU cache warm-up, cache headers, and CP949/EUC-KR filename handling.
entries.details: The README calls out DATA.INI-driven GRF loading, O(1) GRF indexing, LRU file cache, cache warm-up, HTTP cache headers, and Korean filename encoding support with path mapping. This is directly relevant for future RagnaForge hints around browser asset delivery and encoding-safe client lookup.
entries.appliesTo: asset serving, cache, encoding, and client delivery review
warnings: Do not copy private client assets or full cloned repositories into Git.
